programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Luego del accidente de Fernando, Potro decide acompañarlo al hospital y las consecuencias de su caída no se hacen esperar. Una vez más llega el "Boss" a la casa para enviar a los Shore a un nuevo trabajo.

programme.title: Lockup: Orange County: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Unlike prison inmates who have already been convicted and sentenced for their crimes, most jail inmates stand charged and are still working their cases through the court system; the process can take years, so some try to make their jail cells home.

programme.title: Lockup: Corcoran: Extended Stay
programme.desc: California State Prison, Corcoran is a turbulent sea of politics: from old school prison gangs to disruptive street gangs, it's a dangerous mix for staff and inmates; known gang members are sent to security housing units to control their activity.

programme.title: Lockup: Corcoran: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Prison is a lonely place for any inmate; relationships that existed on the outside become strained and the ones that blossom within the prison walls are often dangerous; or they can be simply a one-sided obsession, leading to nothing but trouble.

programme.title: Lockup: Corcoran: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Inmates have been dreaming up new ways to smuggle in contraband since Corcoran opened its doors in 1988; whether in the form of drugs or weapons, it's always a race against time for prison officials to find the banned items before it's too late.

programme.title: Lockup: Corcoran: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Violence often seems inevitable in prison; whether it stems from racial tension, or a dispute between cellmates, it's the job of Corcoran's officers to prevent attacks; in doing so, however, they put their own lives on the line.

programme.title: Lockup: Corcoran: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Inside Corcoran, survival is the number one priority for inmates and officers alike, whether it's inmates treading the dangerous waters of racial politics; or officers keeping themselves and the population safe by tracking down cell-made weapons.

programme.title: Lockup: Corcoran: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Bad decisions have landed thousands of inmates in Corcoran; nce in prison, they've got two choices, do their time and go home or become even more destructive on the inside; the path they choose could determine the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Lockup: Orange County: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Every year, close to 70,000 people are processed through the five facilities that make up the Orange County Jail in Southern California; some will call the jail home until their cases are resolved in court - a process that can take years.

programme.title: Lockup: Orange County: Extended Stay
programme.desc: The Emergency Response Team have their hands full with a sadistic murderer who transforms the jail, a roller derby queen who takes a hard fall and one inmate who realizes that even a good day in jail can have a dark side.

programme.title: Lockup: Orange County: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Unlike prison inmates who have already been convicted and sentenced for their crimes, most jail inmates stand charged and are still working their cases through the court system; the process can take years, so some try to make their jail cells home.

programme.title: Lockup: Corcoran: Extended Stay
programme.desc: California State Prison, Corcoran is a turbulent sea of politics: from old school prison gangs to disruptive street gangs, it's a dangerous mix for staff and inmates; known gang members are sent to security housing units to control their activity.

programme.title: Lockup: Corcoran: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Prison is a lonely place for any inmate; relationships that existed on the outside become strained and the ones that blossom within the prison walls are often dangerous; or they can be simply a one-sided obsession, leading to nothing but trouble.

programme.title: Lockup: Corcoran: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Inmates have been dreaming up new ways to smuggle in contraband since Corcoran opened its doors in 1988; whether in the form of drugs or weapons, it's always a race against time for prison officials to find the banned items before it's too late.

programme.title: Lockup: Corcoran: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Violence often seems inevitable in prison; whether it stems from racial tension, or a dispute between cellmates, it's the job of Corcoran's officers to prevent attacks; in doing so, however, they put their own lives on the line.

programme.title: Lockup: Corcoran: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Inside Corcoran, survival is the number one priority for inmates and officers alike, whether it's inmates treading the dangerous waters of racial politics; or officers keeping themselves and the population safe by tracking down cell-made weapons.

programme.title: Lockup: Corcoran: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Bad decisions have landed thousands of inmates in Corcoran; nce in prison, they've got two choices, do their time and go home or become even more destructive on the inside; the path they choose could determine the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Lockup: Orange County: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Every year, close to 70,000 people are processed through the five facilities that make up the Orange County Jail in Southern California; some will call the jail home until their cases are resolved in court - a process that can take years.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed goes for a drive with Trixie and makes a new friend named Jeanine. Jeanine is a girl who is fond of automobiles and aspires someday to become a racer. However, it turns out that her father despises cars because he has lost his son in a car accident.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: During a race in a desert, Speed meets Dr. Bone, an old archaeologist who was critically injured. It turns out that he was attacked during his search for his daughter, Calcia, who has disappeared after discovering Cleopatra’s Tomb.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: After being struck on the head by a falling rock, Calcia has come to believe herself to be Cleopatra, and has built a kingdom with her followers in the ruins.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed struggles with the Snake Track, a course with seven tough curves. He drives his car without a clue and finds a man called Rock Force, who outmaneuvered a mysterious car that has chased after him by driving on two wheels.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: On a stormy night, Lamster, a man who escaped from prison, arrives at the home of Delicia, Spritle's girlfriend who is blind. The next day, Lamster forces Speed who showed up to Delicia's house, to drive the Mach 5 to Big Baldy Mountain.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: In the darkness, an assassin gang invades the Cupola Castle and plants a bomb to kill the President of Acquirian. Meanwhile, Speed races against Racer X and becomes the champion of the Fujiyama Grand Prix.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed tracks down the assassin gang to an old oriental castle but ends up being captured by assassins who were awaiting him.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: After winning a race abroad, Speed saves a girl, Tanya, who was being attacked by a group of men in town. Tanya tells Speed that her brother, the chief of her tribe, was bitten by a viper, and the serum must be delivered within three hours.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed test-drives a supersonic rocket car designed by Pops Racer for the Vavoom Motor Company to challenge speed records. However, the car gets seriously damaged during the test run, and the test ends in failure.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: After checking the track of Transafrica Grand Prix, Speed boards an airplane with a biology professor named Carnivore. Suddenly, the pilots threaten Carnivore at gunpoint and parachute off the plane with him.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: On the way to an evil mountain where monsters are said to dwell, Speed chases a weird tank that appears in the jungle and finds a secret base at a lake.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed and Trixie participate in the Monte Carlo Rally, but the Mach 5 is hijacked in the Alps during a snowstorm by a man with an injured right hand.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: An assassin with a rifle is attempting to shoot the Princess who is in the royal box to wave the starting flag for the Mystic Grand Prix. However, the plot fails due to mirror reflection.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed escapes from a trap set by the assassin gang, and prevents the assassination of the President of Avalonia, the next target of the assassins. The Vice President and his secretary invite Speed to their official residence.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: To participate in a race in the United States, Speed and Trixie board a passenger plane. Dr. Fantasty, a developer of a new type of rocket fuel, is also aboard.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed, the world-famous racers, and Kabala on a black machine, proceeded the most unusual race in the volcanic mountains of Kapedapek. Will he reach the goal in time?

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Thief Cornpone Brotch and his underlings aim to steal the Indian treasure hidden within Niagara Falls. To distract the tourists, they coerce Twinkle, the circus master's daughter, into performing a daring stunt.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: After falling into the waterfall basin, Speed and Twinkle end up in a secret cave behind the waterfall. The two then encounter Cornpone and his underlings, who have discovered the treasure.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Chim Chim is kidnaped by a mysterious group. He is held captive at a mansion, forced onto a go-cart and given a strange drug. Astonishingly, Chim Chim begins driving the go-cart at high speed.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: The mysterious super-speed vehicle turns out to be equipped with the famous GRX, a demonic engine that attracts racers and drives them to their death.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: An important document is stolen from the National Science Research Center. Speed becomes a suspect as the culprit was seen driving away in the Mach 5.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed chases Dr. Nitecol and Lorena, who has framed Speed as the culprit. Then, a fake Mach 5 appears in front of Speed. He chases the fake Mach 5 which can fly and is equipped with weapons that the original Mach 5 does not have.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: The Baby Grand Prix is held to celebrate the coronation of Prince Jam of Karint Kingdom. Even though Spritle has not reached the age eligible to participate, he accidentally ends up participating in the race.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: During the race, Spritle is mistaken for Prince Jam and is attacked, making him fall to the bottom of a valley. The King and his aides believe that the Prince has died.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and James Braxton head to Lancashire and the Lake District. Natasha eyes some more brooches. James takes a fancy to some sizable and suitably heavy items, but a big spend leaves him a little light in the pocket.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Scotland is Natasha Raskin Sharp and James Braxton's final stop. James is drawn to big and colorful items, while Natasha has an eye for the unusual, with one item conjuring up a memory of her grandfather and another reminding her of James.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Hettie Jago and Tim Medhurst have a replica Jaguar for their shopping trip which begins in sunny Sussex. Tim uncovers an unusual teapot, possibly by William Hutton. Hettie's interest is piqued by an Art Deco figurine of a mouse.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Deep into Surrey, England's most wooded county, Tim Medhurst buys a plaster bust and some salt glazed Toby jugs. Hettie Jago, meanwhile, picks up an Italian gilt box and an elegant brass dancing figure.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Hettie Jago and Tim Medhurst begin today's journey in Henley-on-Thames Hettie finds a fairground carousel horse and an early 20th century Chinese ink drawing of some pigs. Tim buys a granite mortar and a GPO clock with his name on it.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Hettie Jago and Tim Medhurst start out in Lyndhurst. Hettie picks up a large hand saw and a bronze three blade boat propeller. Tim buys an unusual nut with nautical interest and a very special coin.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the last hurrah for Hettie Jago and Tim Medhurst. Hettie spends big on a piece of jewelry that she hopes will give her the big win. Tim buys a slice of a nearly 1000-year-old building and a very interesting treen box.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In the Kent countryside, Irita Marriott and Ishy Khan kick off their road trip in a 1971 Sunbeam Rapier. Ishy finds a vintage fairground mallet while Irita is entranced by an Art Deco French gilded mantel clock.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Traveling along the Kent coast in their 1971 Sunbeam Rapier, Ishy Khan uncovers some vintage good luck charms while Irita Marriott uncovers an Inuit stone carving and an antique compass encased in walnut.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In Suffolk, Irita Marriott unearths a vintage metal artist's palette and Ishy Khan is inspired to find his own metal. They discover an Arabic coffee pot, a brass bowl and a cooper plaque, which may be highly sought after Newlyn copper.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Irita Marriott falls in love with an early 20th century Islamic bowl, vintage fountain pens and a vintage steamer suitcase, while Ishy Khan takes his chances on a Victorian brooch, an Art Deco coin purse and a gear box from a jet fighter.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the final day of the road trip! Irita Marriott finds a 19th century French mantel clock, a vintage ink standish and a copper jug. Ishy uncovers a Chinese bellows, vintage glass salt dish and an early 20th century inkwell.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's day one of the new series! Anita Manning and Mark Stacey start their journey in Aberfeldy and head for auction glory in Dundee.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's still anyone's game, as Anita Manning and Mark Stacey travel from Wiston in South Lanarkshire to Edinburgh.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick visits the home of New Nordic cuisine, Copenhagen, where ground-breaking chefs create artful dishes and religiously stick to seasonal Danish ingredients. Rick goes foraging for rosehip and learns about the art of pickling buds, bark and flowers.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein heads to southern Spain and the historic city of Cadiz, where the narrow winding streets captivate him as he walks in the footsteps of the ancient Phoenician and Arab traders whose influence on the city can still be seen today.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick visits the north-eastern Greek city of Thessaloniki.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: Rick Stein's long weekends across Europe come to a conclusion in the city of Palermo.

programme.title: Rick Stein's India
programme.desc: Rick explores Bengal and Tamil Nadu, the regions that began Britain's love affair with curry; Rick enjoys the prominence of fish and seafood in their dishes, flavored with mustard in Kolkata and tamarind in Chennai.

programme.title: Rick Stein's India
programme.desc: Rick explores Mumbai in search of the bombil, the fish that immortalized Bombay Duck; enjoying Parsee hospitality.

programme.title: Rick Stein's India
programme.desc: Rick is taught the fine art of temple cooking and learns how to eat with his hands; he visits Kerala, where he makes a traditional pork curry and payasam.

programme.title: Rick Stein's India

programme.title: Rick Stein's India
programme.desc: Rick Stein visits the royal state of Rajasthan, a land of kings, hilltop forts and palaces, where the local population are serious meat-eaters.

programme.title: Rick Stein's India
programme.desc: Rick Stein discovers a five-star hotel in Madurai employing local housewives for genuine home-cooked dishes and enjoys Chettinad Chicken, a dish inspired by spices brought back from both the east and the west by traveling merchants.

programme.title: Rick Stein From Venice to Istanbul
programme.desc: Rick's journey begins in the magnificent city of Venice and on the idyllic Greek island of Symi he cooks some of his favorite Venetian dishes: seafood risotto, tiramisu and gnocchi with spider crab.

programme.title: Rick Stein From Venice to Istanbul
programme.desc: Rick Stein continues his gastronomic journey from Venice to Istanbul; in the Byzantine city of Ravenna he discovers Piadinas, street food dating back to Roman times.

programme.title: Rick Stein From Venice to Istanbul

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga crímenes aleatorios en el norte de Virginia y busca a un sospechoso del conflicto, que tiene un deseo incontrolable de matar, él también está lleno de remordimiento.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se llama al UAC a Salt Lake City, Utah, para investigar un triple asesinato, la búsqueda de una conexión entre las víctimas podría llevarlos hasta un fugitivo que podría estar relacionado con el sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El padre de Dinozzo regresa, desempeñando un papel vital en la investigación de un asesinato que podría tener resultados catastróficos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo es asignado para proteger al padre de Ziva, cuando su asistencia a una conferencia de NCIS conduce a algunas sorpresas inesperadas.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo busca respuestas después de que una sorprendente emboscada revele un nuevo giro en su investigación.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS investiga la desaparición de un contramaestre de la Marina que es el único testigo en un juicio por asesinato que se avecina.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Reglas no escritas
programme.desc: Cuando un robo a mano armada termina con la muerte de un oficial, Frank busca justicia. Pero las tensiones aumentan en la casa de los Reagan cuando Erin retira los cargos al sospechoso por falta de evidencia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La ciudad que nunca duerme
programme.desc: Cuando el famoso actor Russell Berke, quien siguió a Danny para investigar su próximo papel, es apuñalado, Danny lo ayuda, pero debe mantener el crimen en secreto debido al estatus de celebridad de Russell.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Proteger y servir
programme.desc: Danny negocia con un hombre que mantiene a Erin como rehén en la corte. Mientras, Frank decide el castigo para Jamie, quien desobedeció órdenes y fue suspendido.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La verdad sobre mentir
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan la muerte de una adolescente empujada al metro. Frank se molesta por la supervisión del nuevo Inspector General en el NYPD.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas con grandes seguidores en las redes sociales son encontradas muertas en Maryland, la UAC busca un sospechoso asumiendo la personalidad de una leyenda urbana de Internet.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un destacado abogado desaparece en Boston, la UAC descubre secretos en su pasado que podrían señalar las razones de su desaparición.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga crímenes aleatorios en el norte de Virginia y busca a un sospechoso del conflicto, que tiene un deseo incontrolable de matar, él también está lleno de remordimiento.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 2/28/2021. Stanley Tucci explores Bologna, seen by many as the food capital of Italy. The region of Emilia-Romagna is home to globally renowned protected food products: parmigiano, prosciutto de Parma and traditional balsamic vinegar to name a few.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 3/7/2021. Stanley Tucci eats and drinks his way around Milan. Here, Stanley enjoys an aperitivo, feels inspired to make pizzoccheri – a noodle made from buckwheat, and enjoys classic Milanese – veal chops and risotto.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 3/14/2021. Stanley Tucci explores his former home: Tuscany. Stanley does a wine bar crawl, celebrates the importance of the lowly loaf and samples dishes which use stale bread as the key ingredient.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 3/21/2021. Stanley Tucci visits Sicily. Here, Stanley tries a salty crunchy sensation, tastes the grapes grown in the region's unique soils, and reflects on Sicilian hospitality.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 3/26/2023. Mexico City is one of the world’s emerging food destinations, and it’s also Eva Longoria’s second home. Longoria takes us to some of her favorite eating spots, but in this constantly evolving city, there is always more to explore.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/2/2023. In the jungles of Yucatán State, on the eastern edge of Mexico, Longoria explores the home of the ancient Maya, where a fierce pride in that ancestry still permeates every custom and dish, even in the most innovative kitchens.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/9/2023. Travelling to the mountains of Southern Mexico, Longoria discovers the hidden magic of Oaxaca that boasts some of the finest ingredients in Mexico, including chocolate, corn, tomatoes and the much-loved quesillo cheese.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/16/2023. Eva Longoria visits the northeastern state of Nuevo Leon, bordering her home state of Texas. As little grows there, and with meat on every menu, inventive and resourceful chefs transform simple ingredients into culinary delights.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/23/2023. Eva Longoria visits the state of Jalisco, where much of what is seen is quintessentially ‘Mexican’ originated. She also discovers that the state capital, Guadalajara, boasts some of the country’s most cutting-edge restaurants.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/30/2023. Eva Longoria explores the port gateway between Mexico and the rest of the world, Veracruz, and discovers that in its people remains a defiant spirit, still evident in their character, music, and the bold flavors of their food.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 2/14/2021. Stanley Tucci feasts on pizza in Naples. Stanley embarks on a whirlwind tour to find the freshest mozzarella and the best San Marzano tomatoes, and enjoys a spectacular spaghetti and zucchini.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 2/21/2021. Stanley Tucci heads to Rome in search of the famous Four Pastas. Stanley orders rigatoni all’amatriciana, samples carbonara and tries a selection of cheeses and sausages made from the sheep and pigs farmed in the region.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 2/28/2021. Stanley Tucci explores Bologna, seen by many as the food capital of Italy. The region of Emilia-Romagna is home to globally renowned protected food products: parmigiano, prosciutto de Parma and traditional balsamic vinegar to name a few.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 3/7/2021. Stanley Tucci eats and drinks his way around Milan. Here, Stanley enjoys an aperitivo, feels inspired to make pizzoccheri – a noodle made from buckwheat, and enjoys classic Milanese – veal chops and risotto.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 3/14/2021. Stanley Tucci explores his former home: Tuscany. Stanley does a wine bar crawl, celebrates the importance of the lowly loaf and samples dishes which use stale bread as the key ingredient.

programme.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
programme.desc: Aired 3/21/2021. Stanley Tucci visits Sicily. Here, Stanley tries a salty crunchy sensation, tastes the grapes grown in the region's unique soils, and reflects on Sicilian hospitality.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver theorizes about America after fleeing a traffic stop, charges keep adding up for an unlicensed driver, and a woman stops at nothing to get to her trailer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man refusing to comply gets tased, recent texts on a suspect's phone paint a different story from what he's told officers, and a woman tries to hide evidence from police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Torrential rain hampers the pursuit of a fleeing vehicle, a man on a moped is carrying more than he lets on, and a persistent police officer unravels a sketchy man's story.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man learns a hard lesson about wearing his seatbelt, and police perform a traffic stop and uncover a sad man with a strange story.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The victim of the home invasion robbery tells a dispatch operator that a man held him at gun-point. A man in a wheelchair is in a stand-off with campus police. Officers respond to a call about a knife-wielding assailant.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend a skittish suspect, a father-to-be leads police on a foot chase, and police struggle to get the truth from a wanted man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man wrecks his friend's car while fleeing police, detectives arrest a man wanted for armed robbery and attempted murder, and officers spy a subject who eluded them earlier.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A repeat offender takes the police on a bumpy ride, a deputy finds paraphernalia in a teen's car, and a woman learns of her brother's drug habit during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue two suspects fleeing from a stolen vehicle. A drunk driver is pulled over after a brief chase. Officers receive a call for help from a juvenile about an attempted break-in.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate an attempted residential robbery that turned deadly. Officers visit a residence to find a suspect facing warrant charges. A high-speed chase comes to an end when the suspect crashes into a fence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A person in a wheelchair gets the better of a possible assailant, a domestic argument escalates to biting, and a man who cuts off a patrolman goes on the offensive.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police break up a street-racing ring, a driver tries to make light of his drug-possession charge, and a woman with a felony arrest warrant is fixated on her oral hygiene.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A runaway cyclist dips into a house to catch his breath. A deputy tries to cut a man some slack despite his mistakes. The owners of an empty house call the police when they hear someone else inside.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop turns dangerous when a driver takes off with a deputy halfway inside the vehicle. Recent changes in the law and a forthright attitude help a man avoid jail time. A neighborhood man gives motorists a scare.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After leading police on a slow pursuit, a sharply-dressed driver has a heated talk with another deputy. In spite of her tears, police unravel a woman’s lies one-by-one. A traditionally bad omen turns into good luck for a couple.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police chase a man running away from his car and a warrant, a driver is just as unlicensed as his vehicle, and a domestic violence call involves two lovers and a hammer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are concerned when a fleeing man leaves a trail of illicit items. A young woman unwisely decides to hang out with a man she nicknamed 'Sketchy.' Some well-placed security cameras help reunite a man with his stolen bike.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An inebriated man is arrested after getting caught peering through the window of a recovery center. After a foot chase officers bring down a well-known local felon. Police respond to a domestic dispute at a local mobile home park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer spots a suspect returning to an area to pick up a hidden stash of narcotics. An officer learns that occupants of a suspicious vehicle has outstanding warrants. A domestic battery is investigated and justice is served.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police respond to a fight in progress call, officers tail a vehicle leaving a house known for drug activity, and a man calls the police after his wife pushes his Harley over.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man leads Officers on a pursuit across county lines. An Officer assists in an undercover sting to capture drug dealers. An Officer finds a gun in a suspects car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect fresh out of jail is found with narcotics. A motorcycle named 'Love Machine' is saved from a hot wire. A man bursts his tire in a bad place and officers come to the rescue.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies assist an injured woman who vows revenge on her male attackers. A woman tells deputies her husband beat her in front of their children. Officers protect an elderly woman from an abusive child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop becomes dangerous when the suspect takes off on the interstate. Officers find a large bag of drugs in a man’s pants. Officers respond to a dispute at a familiar location.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver pursued by police bails from her moving vehicle, a jaywalker decides to run from officers, and a patrol encounters a little boy who decided to run away from home.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man assaults his sister and her dog, a gibberish-speaking man is arrested for attacking his neighbors, and a couple with no-contact orders tells conflicting stories.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are dumbfounded when a man tries to talk them into taking him to jail. Sparks fly when a driver tries to take his truck on the freeway with only two wheels. Deputies are on guard when they approach a belligerent man.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When five bodies are found in what appears to be a meteor site in the middle of the desert, CSI Finlay recognizes one of the casualties, prompting her to revisit her past.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team lends a hand to local law enforcement on the strip with several arrests until a John Doe is found in a car. Also, things become personal for Captain Brass when he discovers some facts about his daughter.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When five people are killed in a small plane crash a mile off the Vegas strip, the CSI team is called to investigate.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the demise of a prominent news anchor during a live broadcast.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs need to ace the case involving a rising tennis star. Meanwhile, the CSIs are surprised to hear Hodges is engaged to an Italian bombshell.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When CSI Mac Taylor decides to surprise his girlfriend in Vegas, he discovers she's missing and asks his friend D.B. Russell for help. Gary Sinise of CSI:NY guest stars.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the demise of a famous Cuban singer's sister who's in town as part of a U.S. tour.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara is a lead suspect in an investigation after a brief encounter with another man in which she was the last person to see him alive.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When several prominent poker players lose their lives, the CSI team is called to investigate before more victims surface.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs join David Phillips at his high school reunion when he discovers the prom queen's been murdered.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSIs find a body near a forest reserve, they discover what might be a serial killer and his bizarre lair.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate a triple homicide, Russell has to find a way to connect with a 6-year-old girl who was the sole survivor and witness.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a popular spiritual retreat when a body is found floating in a mud bath.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a ghost hunter.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de un indigente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga a un desconocido que aparece muerto después de lluvias torrenciales en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI es llamado para investigar a un hombre que apareció muerto dentro de una bola para hámster de tamaño para humanos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI es llamado para investigar el apuñalamiento de una pareja.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un fin de semana de spa para algunos de los miembros del equipo de CSI se convierte en una investigación de asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato en una fiesta elaborada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato a bordo de un avión que acaba de aterrizar.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de Investigación de la Escena del Crimen es llamado para investigar un choque de autos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga dos casos, cada uno de los cuales podría ayudar a resolver el otro.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de una joven de 16 años que está ligada a un burdel.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga los asesinatos de un imitador de Elvis.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el asesinato de una seguidora de estrellas de rock and roll.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un caso de personas extraviadas que involucra a toda una familia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un ataque a la estación de policía se convierte en una crisis de rehenes.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A body in a sinkhole leads Horatio and the CSI team to a robbery, while investigating they discover the target holds a shocking secret.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Alexx's son becomes a suspect in a murder, saving him has dire consequences. Horatio and the CSI team must act to clear him.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a man is killed due to a fake 911 call, Horatio must face off with a private investigator who is systematically destroying the team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When someone is determined to take down Horatio and the CSI team, Horatio puts his life on the line in order to save his team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team will stop at nothing to find who shot Horatio, the evidence leads them to some of the most dangerous people in Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When gasoline gets so expensive that Miami’s residents kill for it, the CSIs come face to face with one of the city’s most sadistic crime rings.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the daughter of Delko's therapist is murdered, Horatio and the CSI team must find the killer before Delko's darkest secrets are exposed.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A savage double murder in the Everglades pits Horatio and the CSI team against the brute force of Miami's own Russian mob.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate a murder in Miami's hippest fashion boutique, Horatio discovers that Julia's instability has turned her into a ticking bomb.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A 200-foot crane crashes into a Miami high rise, putting Calleigh and Delko in jeopardy and killing Horatio’s hope of catching a renowned crime boss.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A man is found handcuffed and stabbed in his hotel room, while a prank at the lab causes a rift in the CSI team and threatens their investigation.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a murderer kidnaps an innocent baby, Horatio and the CSI team must find him before the child becomes his next victim.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a savage killer runs rampant in Miami, Horatio must intervene to stop a member of the police force from getting too close to the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a shooter targets the motel where Delko is staying, Horatio and the CSI team must look into Delko's past to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Se llevan a la fenómeno del tenis Lana Walker de su habitación por la noche y la única evidencia que tienen para continuar es una fibra púrpura encontrada en el marco de la ventana.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando golpean casi hasta la muerte a una ex-víctima de violación, Horacio debe entrar al mundo de las cárceles y las personas en libertad condicional para encontrar al culpable.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un robo/homicidio deja a dos hombres muertos y a un tercero aún con vida, Horacio está decidido a averiguar qué sucedió realmente.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Todd Burton está tratando de salir de la furia del huracán cuando mata a un hombre en medio de una tormenta que le impide ver y ahora lo acusan de homicidio vehicular involuntario.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un gasista se ve envuelto en llamas invisibles y muere. Todo esto sucede durante una carrera clasificatoria del Gran Premio de las Américas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio finalmente cierra el caso del asesinato de su hermano. Se reencuentra con Suzie, una ex-drogadicta que estuvo involucrada con su hermano.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que ven a una mujer siendo atacada por un tiburón, el equipo de CSI descubre que fue asesinada antes de ser arrojada al agua.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una joven es arrojada por la barandilla de un estacionamiento, la investigación sobre su muerte revela pruebas de que la asesinaron antes de la caída.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que encuentran muerto a un anestesiólogo de cirugía plástica por un aparente suicidio, Horatio cree que podría ser un caso de asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un corredor de diamantes es asesinado a tiros en un estacionamiento, un hombre con discapacidad mental presenció el asesinato y quiere ayudar a Horatio a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un hombre, Juan Marco Varón, que puede haber torturado o no a refugiados cubanos, llaman al equipo de CSI para investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y su equipo se adentran en el mundo de las celebridades e investigan el asesinato de un paparazzi. Él descubre que la víctima fue testigo de otro asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Ted Henderson muere en su propia casa y su cuerpo está desaparecido, mientras que dejan a su esposa y su hijo con vida, pero golpeados y atados.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: En los Everglades, cerca de un incendio controlado, Alexx y Delko registran la escena del crimen. Se ven obligados a protegerse cuando un muro de fuego los alcanza.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs are puzzled when evidence and witnesses point to John McEnroe as their murder suspect despite his air-tight alibi.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac, Stella, and Hawkes are forced to save the lab when a drug lord and his crew descend upon the CSI’s vault to retrieve their merchandise.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder on the Statue of Liberty rattles New York City as the CSI team tries to catch the killer before he strikes again.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a professional diver in relation to a rumor of sunken treasure in the New York Harbor.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a murder tied into a string of “spy” robberies targeting the elite while Mac continues to receive mysterious phone calls.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York based team investigates the bizarre murder of a scientist, as well as the unusual death of a college girl.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a string of murders in New York that revolve around an online world, apparently performed by a hit man.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate two eerie murders on Halloween; one, an apparent zombie attack, the other a faked murder/suicide in a house with a spooky past.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team works to solve two seemingly unrelated murders that after investigations are underway turn out to be connected.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates crimes: one involving a model that was killed on a billboard in Times Square, and another centered around a robbery.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of a groom on his wedding day and the appearance of a mysterious box on the hood of Stella’s car.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac travels to Chicago in order to solve the mystery of the 333 caller while the rest of the CSI team works on a murder in a subway car.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a wealthy man in a hip nightclub and the inadvertent shooting of a young boy during a robbery.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of the owner of a posh hotel as well as the death of a teenager that seems to be connected to Peter Pan.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Salud (S8 Ep16)
programme.desc: Una ola de brutalidad amenaza a una pequeña comunidad de la ciudad de Nueva York cuando encuentran un cuerpo descuartizado y estratégicamente abandonado en cuatro esquinas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Obsequio de cumpleaños (S8 Ep17)
programme.desc: Llaman al equipo de CSI a un proyecto de viviendas en Brooklyn para investigar el asesinato de un exitoso empresario que se sintió atraído por su antiguo vecindario.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Cerca de la muerte (S8 Ep18)
programme.desc: Cuando Mac recibe un disparo, se encuentra en el limbo entre la vida y la muerte, mientras lucha por su vida, su equipo debe llevar al tirador ante la justicia.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Reavivó (S9 Ep1)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga cuando un jefe de bomberos, amigo de Mac, muere en un incendio provocado con la técnica que usó un pirómano recientemente liberado bajo palabra.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Donde hubo fuego… (S9 Ep2)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York se apresura para detener al pirómano en serie Leonard Brooks después de que empieza a usar el fuego contra personas de su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: CSI: New York: 4.700 kilómetros (S9 Ep3)
programme.desc: La evidencia encontrada en fotos en la escena de un crimen en el puente de Brooklyn envía a Mac y a Jo a San Francisco en busca de una adolescente desaparecida.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Sin palabras (S9 Ep4)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York se apresura para atrapar a un tirador cuando Lindsay resulta herida durante el intento de asesinato de un candidato político.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Idea equivocada (S9 Ep5)
programme.desc: Mac investiga un caso de hace 20 años que involucra a un niño desaparecido cuando encuentran asesinado al principal sospechoso en el aniversario de la desaparición del niño.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La dama del agua (S9 Ep6)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un cuento de hadas retorcido cuando encuentran a una mujer con un vestido de gala en el fondo del estanque fuera del castillo de Belvedere en el Central Park.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Juego mortal
programme.desc: Cuando los pacientes de un psiquiatra son asesinados sistemáticamente, el equipo de CSI se ve obligado a seguir el juego Cluedo para atrapar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Prueba de honor (S9 Ep8)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI debe adentrarse en el mundo de alta presión de las escuelas preparatorias de elite cuando un estudiante es asesinado mientras estudia para el examen de ingreso a la universidad.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Código sangriento (S9 Ep9)

programme.title: The Manchurian Candidate

programme.desc: Bubba Skinner returns to Los Angeles to tie up some unfinished business on an arson case in Sparta that’s connected to the mob in L.A. He reunites with Mike Chin, the star witness against the mob, and sparks fly once again between Bubba and Pat Day.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Cyrus Chambers and Tom Dalton are business partners in town, but when Cyrus decides he wants out of the partnership the trouble starts. Money and a secret love affair drive Tom to stop at nothing to bring Cyrus down, not even murder.

programme.desc: District Attorney Gerard Darnelle is tough on criminals and has made many enemies throughout his long career. When his daughter is kidnapped, the FBI arrives, but Gillespie and Tibbs sidestep them and follow their own leads to bring her home safely.

programme.desc: When Lonnie Jamison helps Francie Miller, an old high school crush who’s in deep trouble and hitting the bottle, he finds a connection between Francie’s low-life boyfriend, Nick Crews, and a recent armed robbery of a local Sparta supermarket.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos sospechosos están vinculados a un asesinato por unas botas manchadas de sangre y una pistola, pero el dueño de los artículos dice que nunca conoció a la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Aunque su hija ha escapado antes, ella siempre ha regresado. Sus padres estaban seguros de que esta vez no sería diferente, pero estaban equivocados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En un tranquilo pueblo de Gran Bretaña, un granjero se encuentra con una apariencia escalofriante. Empalado en el poste de la cerca hay una cabeza de cordero cortada y una nota que dice: Usted es el próximo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Acechado en la noche
programme.desc: Cuando una víctima es brutalmente asesinada en su propia cama, los investigadores encuentran una huella de zapato en el barro de afuera, evidencia física que esperan que conduzca al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las mujeres en una ciudad de Louisiana viven con el temor de un violador que no deja pistas sobre su identidad. Pero la tecnología y la ciencia del comportamiento se combinan para brindar a la policía una nueva herramienta forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan desafortunado puede ser un hombre? Su esposa se quitó la vida y su novia de la universidad se suicidó de la misma manera catorce años antes. Los investigadores tuvieron que determinar si esto era solo una extraña coincidencia o dos asesinatos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Firme aquí
programme.desc: Una madre de dos hijos desaparece después de salir de compras. Su cuerpo es encontrado un mes después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de un rico empresario estadounidense fue encontrado en su auto de alquiler. Los dientes y fragmentos de huesos fueron los únicos restos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un profesor de gimnasia de secundaria abandona misteriosamente la ciudad sin despedirse de nadie.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Encontrar al sospechoso
programme.desc: Los atentados con bombas son difíciles de resolver, porque el perpetrador no suele estar en la escena y la evidencia se esfuma.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2005, el cuerpo de la joven madre, Summer Baldwin, fue encontrado en una maleta en un vertedero de Texas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una peluquera joven y atractiva fue agredida sexualmente y asesinada en su propio salón de belleza. La evidencia en la escena del crimen no coincidió con ninguno de los sospechosos y, después de la investigación inicial, el caso se archivó por diez años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2000, Christina Sanoubane fue asesinada en su departamento de Cedar Rapids después de dejar a su abusivo novio. Hay pistas en la escena: huellas sangrientas y ADN del kit de violación de la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los jóvenes navajos del suroeste estaban muriendo a un ritmo alarmante. Los curanderos de la tribu proporcionaron a los investigadores una pista fundamental que llevaría al otro lado del mundo al asesino más improbable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas reveladoras
programme.desc: La desaparición de la atleta universitaria de Filadelfia, Aimee Willard, es investigada después de que su carro fuera encontrado al costado de la carretera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Raspando la Superficie
programme.desc: Los científicos forenses trabajan con la única pista recuperada de un tiroteo con múltiples víctimas: una escopeta de calibre 12. Los científicos utilizan métodos únicos para extraer el número de serie del arma y rastrearlo hasta su propietario.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pista elemental
programme.desc: Cuando dos mujeres del mismo pueblo fueron asesinadas de la misma manera, la policía temió que un asesino en serie estuviera suelto.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Paintball
programme.desc: En 1962, la gente de la pequeña ciudad de Hanford, California, perdió la sensación de paz cuando una de las vecinas, Marlene Miller, de 15 años, fue asesinada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encuentra a Nancy Newman y a sus dos hijas que fueron brutalmente asesinadas. La escena del crimen no tiene escasez de pruebas, pero los investigadores no pueden encontrar un vínculo concluyente con su principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La noche del 22 de Mayo de 1992, Betty Wilson regresó a casa después de una reunión y descubrió a su esposo tirado en un charco de sangre. Era evidente que Jack Wilson había sido asesinado – pero ¿cómo?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un recuerdo conmovedor
programme.desc: Una niña inteligente de Visalia, California recuerda dejar huellas dactilares en el vehículo de su secuestrador cuando es secuestrada, lo que ayuda a la policía en su búsqueda junto con una huella de neumático en el barro.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un miembro adinerado de la sociedad muere después de caer de las escaleras, los testimonios de los testigos contradicen la evidencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Vestido para Matar
programme.desc: Se sospecha del padre de una niña cuando ella es asesinada, pero años después la policía se entera que un asesino condenado vivía cerca. Pequeñas gotas de sangre ayudan a la policía a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2002, el director de la funeraria, Lonnie Turner, fue encontrado muerto a tiros. Su hijo, Lonnie júnior, se convirtió en el principal sospechoso, particularmente después de que se descubriera que el asesinato se cometió con su arma.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de una mujer joven fue descubierto en una granja aislada cerca de Delano, California. Ella no tenía identificación, pero la policía encontró las llaves de un buzón de correo en los bolsillos de sus pantalones.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fiebre del oro
programme.desc: El despacho de emergencia recibió una llamada de un hombre que dijo que su novia se disparó y se suicidó. La autopsia reveló que la herida de bala no fue autoinfligida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pareja perfecta
programme.desc: Una examinación de la primera vez que se utilizó ADN animal para resolver un caso penal

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.desc: Only two weeks into training camp, it's time to start making cuts. While "veteran" cheerleaders model bikinis for their upcoming calendar shoot, anxious training camp "rookies" dance their hearts out to prove to Kelli and Judy that they deserve to stay.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige wakes Alex up in her bed – Paige spent the night on the floor – and as the two girls awkwardly prepare for school, they try to avoid the elephant in the room. As in, that they KISSED last night. What happened?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig bursts into rehearsal with the good news – they’ve been accepted to perform at a Northern Sounds Showcase. The band is NOT so into it at first – music is Craig’s dream, not theirs.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Since being "saved" everything has been going Spinner's way: he's made a good friend in Friendship Club leader Linus; his relationship with Darcy has been going strong, and his recent interest in improving school life has been getting him noticed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Simpson-Nelson household is in chaos. With Snake gone and Spike totally down in the dumps, keeping the household together has fallen totally onto Emma’s shoulders.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma is finally getting some control over her life. Snake and Spike are back together, she’s been running every day, and she’s barely eating.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Facing the pressure of year-end exams, the furthest thing from Marco’s mind is what happened a year ago – when Dylan stomped all over his heart. Marco takes this as a sign that he’s over Dylan for good.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The end of another school year finds Darcy’s faith – in her boyfriend – being put to the test. When she discovers that Spinner has a past, Darcy grapples with a harsh reality of teen romance: jealousy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Peter receives a new car for his birthday, he quickly becomes a frequent face in the street racing scene.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things heat up between Emma and Sean – and when she takes time off from Peter to consider her relationship with Sean, Peter takes action – and Sean winds up expelled from Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma is happy that the racing debacle is behind them, and that Peter is finally free if you don’t count the house arrest and five hundred hours of community service.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy starts the year off with big plans, coaching the girl’s junior basketball team and he is determined to take his relationship with Ashley to the next level. But can Jimmy handle the realities of his sexual future?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Peter, hoping to join the Spirit Squad, links Darcy’s personal web page to his. Darcy is thrilled with all the attention and hits she gets, and even posts some racy pictures of the Spirit Squad.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Darcy’s online admirers take up more and more of her time, and her relationship with Spinner suffers. As Darcy posts increasingly sexy photos of herself, she’s surprised when her favourite online fan decides to introduce himself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Career Aptitude test results come in, Spinner is less than pleased with his results, and in desperation, convinces Jimmy to go into business selling T-shirts adorned with Jimmy’s illustrations.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After being released from jail, Sean finds himself sleeping on Spike & Snake’s couch. Sean is focusing on putting the last few months behind him, getting a great job and being a fantastic boyfriend to Emma.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s back in town for a music festival – and Manny can’t help picking up right where they left off.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie thinks all Craig’s bad behaviour is due to Manny – to help him, she’s determined to stay by his side while he’s in town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s intent on getting over Craig, and uses Liberty’s upcoming birthday as an excuse to throw a party at Emma’s house while Spike and Snake are out of town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In shock after over JT’s death, Toby turns to Liberty, convinced that his somber funeral isn’t what JT would’ve wanted. Liberty agrees, and the two grief-stricken friends plan to throw a celebratory memorial for JT at Degrassi.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart examines how the rocks beneath our feet played a crucial role in determining the beliefs of ancient civilisations.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how ancient civilisations learned to exploit the water around them, from the flooding of our Stone Age ancestors' hunting grounds to the fall of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how salt has played a crucial role in the history of the Mediterranean, from the ice ages to the preservation of food and dead bodies in ancient Egypt.

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David travels the world to unravel some of the wonders and puzzles of palaeontology. But how do you find the world's oldest and rarest reptile?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: It is only in recent years that experts have unearthed the biggest dinosaurs that ever lived. One monster eclipsed all others, more than seven times as heavy as diplodocus was the immense argentinosaurus.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A new generation of carnivores was about to take killing to the next level. At the end of the Cretaceous period, these new hunter killers had spread throughout the globe.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A look at bizarre dinosaurs such as the curious buck-toothed Exipdexipteryx, the amazing four-winged Microraptor and the pot-bellied Nothronychus.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: In 2000, scientists made a groundbreaking discovery, explaining how birds evolved from dinosaurs. However, a deeper investigation put a question mark over everything.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Robot
programme.desc: Harry Sullivan is sent to infiltrate Think Tank to discover the truth.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Robot

programme.title: Doctor Who: Robot
programme.desc: The Doctor races to avert a nuclear holocaust. The robot takes Sarah hostage.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Ark in Space
programme.desc: The survivors of Earth lie in hibernation but the Doctor finds there has been an intruder.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Ark in Space
programme.desc: The survivors of the human race start to awaken. But The Doctor is concerned...

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Ark in Space
programme.desc: Humankind faces total destruction. Can the Doctor defeat the Wirrn?

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Ark in Space
programme.desc: Trapped by the Wirrn, The Doctor and his friends are forced into one last terrible gamble.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Sontaran Experiment
programme.desc: Arriving on Earth, the Doctor, Harry, and Sarah meet a group of stranded human colonists.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Sontaran Experiment

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Time Lords send the Doctor, Sarah, and Harry to Skaro at a point in time shortly before the creation of the Daleks. The Doctor's mission is to destroy his greatest enemy.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor finds that some of Davros's fellow Kaleds are unhappy with the development of the Daleks. Sarah is forced to load a Thal war rocket with radioactive explosives.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor informs the Kaled government of Davros's experiments and they move to shut down the bunker. But Davros is one step ahead and prepares to take drastic action.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks
programme.desc: When the Kaled dome is destroyed by the Thals' rocket, the war appears to be over and the Thals rejoice at their victory. But then, the Daleks appear and a massacre begins.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks
programme.desc: With Harry and Sarah as his prisoners, Davros interrogates the Doctor, forcing him to reveal the future of the Daleks so that he can learn from their defeats to make them stronger.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Genesis of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Kaled scientific elite move to prevent the development of the Daleks while the Doctor prepares to destroy them forever. But is it already too late?

programme.title: Doctor Who: Revenge of The Cybermen
programme.desc: The crew of Nerva has fallen victim to a space plague.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Revenge of The Cybermen
programme.desc: Sarah is a victim of the plague and the only cure is to transmat her down to Voga.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Revenge of The Cybermen
programme.desc: Nerva Beacon is invaded by the Cybermen who are intent on destroying Voga.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Revenge of The Cybermen
programme.desc: The Cybermen intend to crash the bomb-laden Nerva Beacon into the planet Voga.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Pyramids of Mars
programme.desc: The Doctor, Sarah, and Laurence Scarman are being hunted down by Sutekh's robot mummies.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Pyramids of Mars

programme.title: Doctor Who: Pyramids of Mars
programme.desc: Inside the pyramid on Mars, the Doctor and Sarah must prevent Sutekh's release.

programme.desc: On Earth, all is not as it seems as the Doctor and Sarah discover the dead are walking.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Android Invasion
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers Styggron's plan to wipe out all human life on Earth.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Android Invasion
programme.desc: The Doctor and Sarah try to warn UNIT of the Kraal invasion, but nobody believes them.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Weimaraner eats everything in sight; a yellow Lab's excess energy is expressed destructively; an Australian shepherd is unable to socialize with other dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A French bulldog fails the doggy day-care entrance exam; three Jack Russell terriers fight one another for their owner's attention; a beagle howls incessantly while on walks.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A mail carrier learns to thwart dog attacks; two Pomeranians attack each other when left alone; a Swiss mountain dog is aggressive around food.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A miniature schnauzer compulsively spins in circles; four French bulldogs do not listen to their owner; a mixed breed has a leash tied so tightly it has to be surgically removed.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar Milan is called in to help singer Patti LaBelle who is afraid of her own guard dog and a teacher who wants to unify her dog's dual personalities.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A ridgeback mix has eccentricities; a Jack Russell terrier attacks motorcycles; a border collie's herding instincts get the best of him.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Australian shepherd is too dedicated to its owner; a beagle mix lashes out at anyone who walks past; an Italian mastiff fears cars.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A puppy terrorizes its owner's cat; a spoiled Yorkshire terrier; a Rottweiler is aggressive toward strangers.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Italian greyhound mix is possessive over bones and toys; a mastiff misbehaves outside; a Yorkshire terrier takes over her owner's morning routine.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An unpredictably aggressive Kerry blue terrier; two territorial Maltese dogs who are close to being banned from the retirement home where they live; a bloodhound/Catahoula mix who attacks her canine companion.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar visits Tijuana, Mexico, to team up with volunteers from United Hope for Animals, an organization that rescues dogs and finds them U.S. homes; a cocker spaniel taunts her owner.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A golden retriever mix with canine aggression; a bearded collie who barks, howls and scratches at her owner's boyfriend's guitar; a Lhasa apso/Cavalier Kind Charles Spaniel with canine aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to restore peace at an apartment complex where the residents' dogs do not get along; a family has trouble controlling its three dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An American Eskimo dog attacks doors and windows whenever people pass; a shiba inu overprotects his corgi playmate; two bulldogs are aggressive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere, and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail, leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday, but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday, but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth calls a client, Daphne, whose bond they have to revoke and makes a shocking discovery: Daphne's cosigner on her bond and ex-boyfriend, Bobby, has just committed suicide.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community, where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kolani's on the run, left his wife to look after four kids, and left Dog holding the bag for the $10k bond. So their pursuit of this case takes them into some parts of Oahu, and the human heart, that few of us will ever see.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today the crew is hunting for Holly, a car thief. She's one of Tim's bonds, and the entire Dog crew knows that means trouble--or at least a long and difficult chase.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is tracking down Cecilia, who's wanted for car theft, but she's nowhere to be found. Her girlfriend and co-signer has gone missing too. Just when the trail goes cold, a friend leads the team to the cosigner's empty apartment.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth and the team are in Colorado, and they face a special challenge--getting the kids to camp. After the drop-off, Dog is more than ready to track down a fugitive. Robin disposed of a body after a homicide, and now he's skipped his court date.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in search of a potentially dangerous fugitive, he's only 19 and charged with kidnapping and menacing. The case takes an unexpected turn when the Chapman clan ends up in a confrontation with the suspect's family.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team are back in Colorado hunting bounties. Today's fugitive has a long rap sheet and a reputation for packing heat. With nothing but an address and phone number, the team heads out on the hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kimo does a vanishing act for his day in court, and now Dog and the posse have to find him. With precious few leads to follow, Dog turns to the fugitive's on again-off-again girlfriend, but she's initially reluctant to join the hunt.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: To mark International Dog Day tomorrow, a special episode celebrating the magical relationship between man and dog.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: The Mazza family is searching for a new family member to grow up with their two young boys and will be visiting the Coton de Tulear, the English Springer Spaniel and finally the Yorkshire Terrier. Will Dad be able to fall in love with a not-so-manly …

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter rushes into Skeldale on his day off to try and save Richard Bell's lamb, who was badly injured when he was born just a few hours ago. And at Suzanne Benson's trekking centre, Julian's treating a very poorly one-week old llama called Noah.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: Alan Davies returns for what’s set to be an even bigger and better third series of The Dog Rescuers.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Kitten is on branch in vase; puppies on swing; hamster in cage; little girl hiding the eye of the camera.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter treats a ewe that is struggling to give birth to twin lambs and also performs a complicated and risky surgery on a tawny owl to remove the bird's ruptured eyeball.

programme.title: Pet Obsessed: Pet Obsessed Marathon
programme.desc: Featuring ridiculous clips, digital shorts and tons of fluff; these are the internet's most outrageous and outspoken pets... A.K.A. your newest obsession!

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian Norton is called out to examine an alpaca, new vet Helen Blackburn performs an emergency caesarean on a beagle and Peter tries to save the eyesight of Whisper the lamb.

programme.title: Dogs with Jobs
programme.desc: MARTY AND THE MADCAP MUTTS (New Jersey) Marty is the star of The Madcap Mutts, a dazzling troop made up of dogs rescued from shelters. The mutts now travel the U.S. and deliver crowd-pleasing shows wherever they go.

programme.title: Breeder of the Pack
programme.desc: If there were a doggie Olympics, Kayl McCann would be captain of the Canadian team. Her days (and nights and weekends) revolve around breeding these smart, sassy and speedy dogs.

programme.title: To The Rescue
